sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63782" key="logxeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογχ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n63782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pierce with a spear,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.300</biblScope> </bibl> (in tit.).</sense> </entryFree>
